Researchers develop innovative model for risk assessment for hypertrophic cardiomyopathy May 11, 2026 — NIH-funded study incorporates new measures to better predict outcomes in chronic heart condition. NIH-funded study suggests that testosterone suppresses brain tumor growth in males May 6, 2026 — Findings may warrant exploration of the hormones as glioblastoma treatment.
